# User-guide screenshots (auto-generated)

**Do not edit or replace these by hand.** Every PNG here is generated by
[`scripts/screenshots.mjs`](../../scripts/screenshots.mjs).

To regenerate them after a UI change:

```bash
npm start                       # serve the app on http://localhost:3100 (in one terminal)
npm run shots                   # capture every screen → docs/img/  (in another)
```

`npm run shots` logs in with `OWNER_EMAIL` / `OWNER_PASSWORD` from `.env`, visits
each screen at a phone size (and a couple at desktop size), and overwrites the
files here. Point it elsewhere with `SHOTS_URL=https://your-app… npm run shots`.

They're embedded in [`../USER-GUIDE.html`](../USER-GUIDE.html). Filenames are
referenced there, so keep the names stable.
